workload.description: Tool-call bench (#1196): per-axis, provenance-scored measurement of a model's ability to use its belt. The provider generates the sandbox fresh per run with run-unique DMX- tokens, dispatches one containerized task per axis (selection, arguments, chaining at several depths, recovery, termination honesty), and scores mechanically from the final answer + the trajectory. Emits scores.json (#1198). Knobs (override by copying this manifest into your workloads dir): trials = dispatches per task (pass^k substrate), chainDepths = the chaining ladder, taskTimeoutSeconds = per-dispatch cap, seed = fix the fixture for reproduction (omitted = fresh nonces every run).
